description: A homebuilt aircraft company is designing a modernized canard pusher kit aircraft based on the Rutan VariEze. A specification document has been provided by the chief designer at /home/ga/Desktop/canard_pusher_spec.txt. Read this specification carefully. Then, open OpenVSP and build a parametric model matching the spec. The model MUST include a fuselage, an aft-mounted swept main wing, a forward-mounted canard wing, and at least one vertical surface (winglet/fin). It is critical that the canard is positioned ahead of the main wing along the X-axis. Save the completed model to /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/canard_pusher.vsp3.
